scripts.test: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const args = process.argv.slice(1); const target = args.length ? ['--prefix','backend','run','test','--', ...args] : ['--prefix','web','test','--']; const r = spawnSync('npm', target, { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(r.status ?? 1);"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix web run build
